concerns.text: Spec requires Hanabi/CoQA datasets (FR-001) but no verified sources exist. Plan proposes synthetic generation fallback, which may not satisfy transactive-memory dynamics research question requiring authentic game-state facts and cue annotations.

9,000 game simulations with CPU-only LLM inference within 6h runtime target is aggressive for GitHub Actions free-tier. Consider reducing game count or using smaller models (e.g., distilgpt2) to ensure feasibility.
